title: Daoist Canon: Beidou Jing (Northern Dipper Scripture) (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Beidou Jing (Northern Dipper Scripture)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Beidou Jing (Northern Dipper Scripture)

translation.text: From the Beidou Jing (Northern Dipper Scripture) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
